_comment: Phase 3 (AF3 mg_fpp holo cofold -> final 16/class = 48). THE CORRECTED scheme (FILTERING_AND_SELECTION.md 3b), VERIFIED to reproduce the archived 48 EXACTLY (48/48): reference-independent holo gate (canonical motif-coordinated Mg by BOTH DDXXD + NSE/DTE carboxylates AND FPP diphosphate coordinating it, diphosphate_to_nearest_ion<=3.0) + novelty gate (id<=0.72) -> pass c0 91 / c1 96 / c10 88; quality-only rank SCORE = z(mean_plddt)+z(-proteinmpnn_nll)+z(-a3d_avg_score)+z(iptm) (novelty is NOT scored); MMseqs2 diversity dedup -> 16/class. NOT the superseded tiered v1 (which leaned on the apo metal-point). Cyclization geometry (foldback_c1_to_distal, n_aromatics_lining) is computed as a REPORTED QC sanity check but deliberately NOT a filter/ranker here: necessary-not-sufficient with a non-monotonic optimum, and applying it as a hard filter WOULD bind (only 40/48 of the real finalists satisfy foldback<=7.0 AND n_aromatics_lining>=3), so it would change the set rather than sanity-confirm it. Column names use the INTEGRATED tps_eval tools: mg_canonical_motif_coordination from ion_site_check; diphosphate_to_nearest_ion from substrate_positioning; iptm from global_confidence; mean_plddt/proteinmpnn_nll/a3d_avg_score carried from Phase 2. (The archived 2026-06 run named these canonical / diphos_to_nearest_ion / af3_iptm in ad-hoc CSVs.)
